All clear. Here's what I found:

**Files reviewed:** `explore.py`, `pricing.py`, `purchase.py`, `components.py`

**What changed in the last 3 commits:**
- `components.py` — CSS-only changes: touch target sizing (padding/min-height/min-width) on `.pill-filter`, `.copy-btn`, the sticky bar dismiss button, and the "Visit →" card link
- `explore.py` — CSS-only change: touch target padding added to "Clear all" link
- `pricing.py` — deleted from git (full content reviewed, clean)
- `purchase.py` — deleted from git (empty stub, no user text)

**Typos found:** None

All user-facing strings — headings, button labels, error messages, meta descriptions, and paragraph copy — are clean across every changed file. No edits required.
